changeSet.author: listing
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX range_search_idx ON hearing USING GIN ( (properties -> 'courtCentreId'), (properties -> 'allocated'), (properties -> 'jurisdictionType'), (properties -> 'weekCommencingStartDate'), (properties -> 'weekCommencingEndDate'), (properties -> 'startDate'), (properties -> 'endDate'), (properties -> 'courtRoomId'), (properties -> 'type' ->'id') )
